file: 1454_Li 等 - 2025 - Aromatization-free strategy for sustainable aviation fuel Co-upcycling waste oils and polystyrene p.txt

experiments.description: 使用Pd/SBA-15、Pd/HZSM-5和Pd/USY催化剂对月桂酸进行气相催化氢化，评估催化剂酸度对C8-C16航空燃料范围烃类选择性的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: Gas-phase catalytic hydrogenation (GCH) experiments were conducted using a two-stage pressurized fixed-bed reactor. In the first stage, lauric acid was vaporized, and the vapor was then introduced into the second-stage reactor for catalytic hydrogenation. The reaction was performed under the following conditions: 320 ◦C, 0.15 MPa, with 5 mg of catalyst, ensuring a catalyst-to-feed (C/F) mass ratio of 10:1.

experiments.description: 使用Pd/SBA-15、Pd/HZSM-5和Pd/USY催化剂对苯乙烯进行气相催化氢化，评估催化剂对芳香烃选择性的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: Styrene, which represents the aromatic-rich structure of waste plastics such as PS, was subjected to gas-phase catalytic hydrogenation under identical reaction conditions. As shown in Fig. 4and S7, all three catalysts achieved complete styrene conversion, demonstrating high catalytic activity.

experiments.description: 使用Pd/SBA-15、Pd/HZSM-5和Pd/USY催化剂对月桂酸和苯乙烯混合物进行共处理，模拟废油和PS废塑料的同时升级，评估催化剂对C8-C16烃类选择性的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: The co-processing of lauric acid and styrene was studied to model the concurrent upgrading of waste oils and PS waste plastics. As shown in Fig. 5and S8, all three catalysts achieved high conversion of both model compounds.

Operation mode.value: Gas-phase catalytic hydrogenation in a pressurized fixed-bed reactor
Operation mode.original: Gas-phase catalytic hydrogenation in a pressurized fixed-bed reactor

Conversion rate.value: Complete conversion achieved with all catalysts
Conversion rate.original: Complete conversion achieved with all catalysts

Product yield.original: 71.0 wt% C8-C16 jet fuel components with Pd/SBA-15

Product Selectivity.original: 84.5% selectivity for C8-C16 jet fuel with Pd/SBA-15

Catalyst stability.original: Pd/SBA-15 maintained consistent performance over 10 repeated cycles, with jet fuel yield remaining above 63.0 wt% after 10 cycles
